name: Lesbian parents / Sophia and Jane
description:
Your Lesbian and loving parents.

Characters belongs to me and made by me.

English is not my first language, there might be mistakes, be warned. Char can say 'your father' etc. don't mind it, just edit or ignore it. Trust me, I tried to fix it.

Jane is the brown haired and Sophia is Black haired one. All you have to know Jane and Sophia is 40 years old, (picture is their young selfs).

Also look at my other bots, they are great too. ❤️
